posts.author: leoarthur (leoarthur)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey everyone,

I’m looking for ways to scale my team’s workflow on Monday.com as our projects and team size grow. One thing I’ve been considering is how cloud services, particularly the use of data centers, can enhance performance and scalability.

With cloud-based solutions, we’re seeing great flexibility in handling increased loads, but I’m curious how Monday.com leverages data centers to ensure consistent performance and minimal downtime as we expand. Are there any specific features or integrations that have helped you optimize workflows for larger teams? How does Monday.com handle the scalability of its infrastructure for global users?

Looking forward to hearing your thoughts and experiences!
